title: Hotbar Totems
description: Makes Totems of Undying work even when in hotbar!
body:
# Hotbar Totems

[![Modrinth Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hotbar-totems) [![GitHub Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/ferdinandkeller/hotbar-totems)

Some may find that having to hold the totem to make use of it cumbersome, as it uses a hand slot.

Now it works even when the totem isn't in the hand, but in the hotbar!

Be careful, it won't work if the totem is in the inventory, or in a bundle/shulker.

*Before danger, no totem in hand*
![Before the player felt into lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5ea82e611819e7560061baca8b4c246dff55499.jpeg)

*Death prevented, no totem in hand*
![After the player felt into lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/572bb34880179052e33ca26e2ebca826e09b0625.jpeg)
